title: Affordable Rails
description: This data-pack changes the crafting recipe of all rails to make them more affordable!
body:
Minecraft Rails are TOO EXPENSIVE. I mean who wants to spend a whole six ingots for only a chunk's worth of travel?

Thats why I made this Data Pack! It replaces the rail recipes with significantly cheaper versions! Instead of costing 6 iron, 16 rails now costs 6 nuggets! 

And it's not just regular rails! Activator Rails, Detector Rails, and Powered Rails were all given the same treatment!
